steps.title: Find the research gap
steps.content: Lin studied convergence through shared genetic mechanisms, while Moravec studied convergence through different mechanisms. The passage says the relative prevalence of both processes remained poorly understood.

steps.title: Match the broader study
steps.content: A invents an earlier assumption. B invents data reuse from the prior studies. D wrongly says Lin and Cole and Vale both compared the two mechanisms. The remaining option captures Cole and Vale evaluating both types in one study. The answer is C.
